entries.original: App-server integrations now support Unix socket transport, pagination-friendly resume/fork, sticky environments, and remote thread config/store plumbing. (#18255, #18892, #18897, #18908, #19008, #19014)
entries.translated: App-server integrations now support Unix socket transport, pagination-friendly resume/fork, sticky environments, and remote thread config/store plumbing. (#18255, #18892, #18897, #18908, #19008, #19014)

entries.original: App-server plugin management can install remote plugins and upgrade configured marketplaces. (#18917, #19074)
entries.translated: App-server plugin management can install remote plugins and upgrade configured marketplaces. (#18917, #19074)

entries.original: Permission profiles now round-trip across TUI sessions, user turns, MCP sandbox state, shell escalation, and app-server APIs. (#18284, #18285, #18286, #18287, #19231)
entries.translated: Permission profiles now round-trip across TUI sessions, user turns, MCP sandbox state, shell escalation, and app-server APIs. (#18284, #18285, #18286, #18287, #19231)

entries.original: Model providers now own model discovery, with AWS/Bedrock account state exposed to app clients. (#18950, #19048)
entries.translated: Model providers now own model discovery, with AWS/Bedrock account state exposed to app clients. (#18950, #19048)

entries.original: `codex exec --json` now reports reasoning-token usage for programmatic consumers. (#19308)
entries.translated: `codex exec --json` now reports reasoning-token usage for programmatic consumers. (#19308)

entries.original: Rollout tracing now records tool, code-mode, session, and multi-agent relationships, with a debug reducer command for inspection. (#18878, #18879, #18880)
entries.translated: Rollout tracing now records tool, code-mode, session, and multi-agent relationships, with a debug reducer command for inspection. (#18878, #18879, #18880)

entries.original: Interrupting `/review` and exiting the TUI no longer leaves the interface wedged on delegate startup or unsubscribe. (#18921)
entries.translated: Interrupting `/review` and exiting the TUI no longer leaves the interface wedged on delegate startup or unsubscribe. (#18921)

entries.original: Exec-server no longer drops buffered output after process exit and now waits correctly for stream closure. (#18946, #19130)
entries.translated: Exec-server no longer drops buffered output after process exit and now waits correctly for stream closure. (#18946, #19130)

entries.original: App-server now respects explicitly untrusted project config instead of auto-persisting trust. (#18626)
entries.translated: App-server now respects explicitly untrusted project config instead of auto-persisting trust. (#18626)

entries.original: WebSocket app-server clients are less likely to disconnect during bursts of turn and tool-output notifications. (#19246)
entries.translated: WebSocket app-server clients are less likely to disconnect during bursts of turn and tool-output notifications. (#19246)

entries.original: Windows sandbox startup handles multiple CLI versions and installed app directories better, and background `Start-Process` calls avoid visible PowerShell windows. (#19044, #19180, #19214)
entries.translated: Windows sandbox startup handles multiple CLI versions and installed app directories better, and background `Start-Process` calls avoid visible PowerShell windows. (#19044, #19180, #19214)

entries.original: Config/schema handling now rejects conflicting MultiAgentV2 thread limits, resolves relative agent-role config paths, hides unsupported MCP bearer-token fields, and rejects invalid `js_repl` image MIME types. (#19129, #19261, #19294, #19292)
entries.translated: Config/schema handling now rejects conflicting MultiAgentV2 thread limits, resolves relative agent-role config paths, hides unsupported MCP bearer-token fields, and rejects invalid `js_repl` image MIME types. (#19129, #19261, #19294, #19292)

entries.original: App-server docs and generated schemas were refreshed for the new transport, thread, marketplace, sticky environment, and permission-profile APIs. (#18255, #18897, #19014, #19074, #19231)
entries.translated: App-server docs and generated schemas were refreshed for the new transport, thread, marketplace, sticky environment, and permission-profile APIs. (#18255, #18897, #19014, #19074, #19231)

entries.original: Rollout-trace documentation now covers the debug trace reduction workflow. (#18880)
entries.translated: Rollout-trace documentation now covers the debug trace reduction workflow. (#18880)

entries.original: Refreshed `models.json` and related core, app-server, SDK, and TUI fixtures for the latest model catalog and reasoning defaults. (#19323)
entries.translated: Refreshed `models.json` and related core, app-server, SDK, and TUI fixtures for the latest model catalog and reasoning defaults. (#19323)

entries.original: Windows Bazel CI now uses a stable PATH and shared query startup path for better cache reuse. (#19161, #19232)
entries.translated: Windows Bazel CI now uses a stable PATH and shared query startup path for better cache reuse. (#19161, #19232)

entries.original: Plugin marketplace add/remove/startup-sync internals moved out of `codex-core`, and curated plugin cache versions now use short SHAs. (#19099, #19095)
entries.translated: Plugin marketplace add/remove/startup-sync internals moved out of `codex-core`, and curated plugin cache versions now use short SHAs. (#19099, #19095)

entries.original: Reverted a macOS signing entitlement change after it caused alpha startup failures. (#19167, #19350)
entries.translated: Reverted a macOS signing entitlement change after it caused alpha startup failures. (#19167, #19350)

entries.original: Stabilized flaky approval-popup and plugin MCP tool-discovery tests. (#19178, #19191)
entries.translated: Stabilized flaky approval-popup and plugin MCP tool-discovery tests. (#19178, #19191)

entries.translated: Reject agents.max_threads with multi_agent_v2
